title: Skycat's Lucky Blocks
description: The result of thinking the original lucky blocks was dead (which is false) and ModFest 1.21
body:
Good old lucky blocks! Craft them with gold around a dispenser and break them to see what you get. Created for ModFest 1.21 as a "throwback." I didn't do enough research to realize that lucky blocks are still very much a thing.
Works with Sinytra Connector and FFAPI.
